codeReview.summary: The fix addresses the prior blocking determinism failure by replacing host-environment branching with deterministic seams (`CLILaunchAdapter.executableResolver`, `CLILaunchInvoker.launchHandler`) and by converting same-profile launch contention into controlled in-progress simulation. The previously failing same-profile assertion path is now deterministic and no longer depends on locally installed CLI binaries.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Transcript skeleton shows an attempted startup read at `/Users/dewclaw/.factory/library/user-testing.md` (ENOENT) before proceeding; guidance should explicitly steer workers to the repo-scoped path to avoid recurring startup noise.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: worker-transcripts.jsonl entry for session `662457d3-c2d9-40fe-a9d1-ae52246fc116` includes `Read` on `/Users/dewclaw/.factory/library/user-testing.md` followed by `Error reading file: ENOENT`, while the valid file exists at `/Users/dewclaw/Documents/Projects/BurnBar/.factory/library/user-testing.md`.

summary: PASS: Reviewed prior failed diff (9039c7a...) and fix implementation diff (f8ffd580...), plus fix-session transcript skeleton evidence.
